body.raw:
<request version='1.0'>
    <header>
        <office></office>
        <user></user>
        <password></password>
        <keepsession>true</keepsession>
    </header>
    <search searchid="" total="true" pagesize="100" >
        <object>
            <Policy >
                <Insured/>
                <CreatedOn/>
                <PolicyNumber/>
                <CarrierName/>
                <Owner/>
                <Payor/>
                <Beneficary/>
                <IssuedDate/>
                <AnnualPremium/>
                <PremiumMode/>
                <Premium/>
                <PlanName/>
            </Policy>
        </object>
        <condition>
            <expr prop='CreatedOn' op='lt'>
                <v>2025-09-20</v>
            </expr>
        </condition>
    </search>
</request>

body.raw:
<request version="1.0">
    <header>
        <office/>
        <user/>
        <password/>
        <keepsession>true</keepsession>
    </header>
    <search searchid="" total="true" pagesize="100">
        <object>
            <Contact>
                <FirstName/>
                <LastName/>
                <TaxID/>
                <Person>
                    <Dob/>
                    <Gender/>
                    <Occupation/>
                </Person>
                <Addresses>
                    <Address>
                        <Line1/>
                        <City/>
                    </Address>
                </Addresses>
                <Phones>
                    <Phone>
                        <PhoneType/>
                        <CountryCode/>
                        <AreaCode/>
                        <Number/>
                        <Extension/>
                    </Phone>
                </Phones>
                <WebAddresses>
                    <WebAddress>
                        <WebAddressType/>
                        <Address/>
                    </WebAddress>
                </WebAddresses>
            </Contact>
        </object>
        <condition>
            <expr prop='Contact.ClientType' op='eq'>
                <v>7</v>
            </expr>
        </condition>
    </search>
</request>
